explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.

closing.summary: Parmesan has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
